mapper.sql: MEMBER_PT_NO, MEMBER_NO, CONT_NO, ORG_NO, BAL_PT, ISU_PT, ISU_CANCEL_PT, USE_PT, USE_CANCEL_PT, EXP_PT, REG_USER_ID, REG_DT, LAST_MOD_USER_ID, LAST_MOD_DT
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from t_member_pt_mst
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into t_member_pt_mst (MEMBER_PT_NO, MEMBER_NO, CONT_NO, ORG_NO, BAL_PT, ISU_PT, ISU_CANCEL_PT, USE_PT, USE_CANCEL_PT, EXP_PT, REG_USER_ID, REG_DT, LAST_MOD_USER_ID, LAST_MOD_DT) values (#{memberPtNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{memberNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{balPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{isuPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{isuCancelPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{usePt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{useCancelPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{expPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into t_member_pt_mst
MEMBER_PT_NO,
MEMBER_NO,
CONT_NO,
ORG_NO,
BAL_PT,
ISU_PT,
ISU_CANCEL_PT,
USE_PT,
USE_CANCEL_PT,
EXP_PT,
REG_USER_ID,
REG_DT,
LAST_MOD_USER_ID,
LAST_MOD_DT,
#{memberPtNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{memberNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{balPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{isuPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{isuCancelPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{usePt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{useCancelPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{expPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update t_member_pt_mst
MEMBER_PT_NO = #{row.memberPtNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
MEMBER_NO = #{row.memberNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
CONT_NO = #{row.contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ORG_NO = #{row.orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
BAL_PT = #{row.balPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ISU_PT = #{row.isuPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ISU_CANCEL_PT = #{row.isuCancelPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
USE_PT = #{row.usePt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
USE_CANCEL_PT = #{row.useCancelPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
EXP_PT = #{row.expPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
REG_USER_ID = #{row.regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REG_DT = #{row.regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{row.lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LAST_MOD_DT = #{row.lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

update t_member_pt_mst set MEMBER_PT_NO = #{row.memberPtNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, MEMBER_NO = #{row.memberNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CONT_NO = #{row.contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ORG_NO = #{row.orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, BAL_PT = #{row.balPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ISU_PT = #{row.isuPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ISU_CANCEL_PT = #{row.isuCancelPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, USE_PT = #{row.usePt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, USE_CANCEL_PT = #{row.useCancelPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, EXP_PT = #{row.expPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, REG_USER_ID = #{row.regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REG_DT = #{row.regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{row.lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_MOD_DT = #{row.lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

update t_member_pt_mst
MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
CONT_NO = #{contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ORG_NO = #{orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
BAL_PT = #{balPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ISU_PT = #{isuPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ISU_CANCEL_PT = #{isuCancelPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
USE_PT = #{usePt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
USE_CANCEL_PT = #{useCancelPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
EXP_PT = #{expPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
REG_USER_ID = #{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REG_DT = #{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LAST_MOD_DT = #{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where MEMBER_PT_NO = #{memberPtNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update t_member_pt_mst set MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CONT_NO = #{contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ORG_NO = #{orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, BAL_PT = #{balPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ISU_PT = #{isuPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ISU_CANCEL_PT = #{isuCancelPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, USE_PT = #{usePt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, USE_CANCEL_PT = #{useCancelPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, EXP_PT = #{expPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, REG_USER_ID = #{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REG_DT = #{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_MOD_DT = #{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where MEMBER_PT_NO = #{memberPtNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}
